title: How to answer ALL wacky spiritual questions with science

enrichment.summary: Kyle proposes creating a mathematical framework that unifies reincarnation with scientific evolution, where a soul progresses through every organism from single-celled life up to human by tallying lifespans and interactions at each stage. He suggests this equation could answer esoteric spiritual questions — including classic theological puzzles like how many angels fit on a needle's head — by grounding them in mainstream biology. He acknowledges the idea is half-formed and that he is high while explaining it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: not either/or — both can be integrated into a unified framework
a soul is born with the earth and evolves upward through every organism
disagrees with the Buddhist turtle metaphor — becoming human requires living every prior lifespan, it is not random

stances.topic: third world countries and soul age
stances.position: raises the idea tentatively but immediately flags it as potentially racist and requires heavy caveating
all esoteric religious/theological questions can be answered scientifically by plugging them into evolutionary biology
